arts.ttl: Carlisle United loanees Dominic Sadi and Dan Adu-Adjei recalled by Bournemouth
arts.sum: CARLISLE United have confirmed that Dominic Sadi and Dan Adu-Adjei have been recalled by their parent club Bournemouth AFC.

arts.ttl: Callum Whelan: 'I'm really desperate to succeed at Carlisle United'
arts.sum: INTERVIEW: The new signing talks about his move, and his route to Carlisle United via Manchester United, Oldham and Gateshead.

arts.ttl: Carlisle v MK Dons among games off due to freeze
arts.sum: Carlisle United's League Two fixture against MK Dons on Saturday is among the fixtures to be postponed due to freezing weather conditions.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United's clash with MK Dons postponed due to 'frozen' pitch
arts.sum: CARLISLE United's clash with MK Dons has been postponed due to the playing surface at Brunton Park being 'frozen', the club has confirmed.

arts.ttl: Cumbrian star with a 'high ceiling' who's set to face Carlisle United
arts.sum: Carlisle United boss Mike Williamson says MK Dons’ Cumbrian Premier League loan star Joe White is a player of real potential.

arts.ttl: MK Dons boss: Williamson's Carlisle United are in a 'false position'
arts.sum: MK Dons boss Scott Lindsey insists Carlisle United are "probably in a false position” under Mike Williamson.

arts.ttl: Former Carlisle United striker leaves Championship club for Norway
arts.sum: Former Carlisle United striker Elias Sørensen has left the English game after half a season in the Championship with Portsmouth.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United's plans amid the big freeze
arts.sum: Mike Williamson says Carlisle United are doing all they can to prepare for MK Dons despite the disruption of the freezing weather.

arts.ttl: Barrow sign son of ex-Carlisle United boss and move for Blues 'target'
arts.sum: Barrow are set to sign a player who has been linked with Carlisle United - having also brought in the son of a former Blues manager.
